moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stages
moments.blurb: The biggest football tournament in the world is currently underway, co-hosted by Canada, Mexico, and the USA, with group stage matches continuing.

angles.name: Global Footy Fever
angles.copy: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing across North America! Who are you backing for glory in the group stages? #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: Daily Match Buzz
angles.copy: More World Cup action today! Catch the latest from the group stages as teams battle for a spot in the knockouts. Who's impressed you most so far?

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Begin
moments.blurb: The 139th edition of The Championships, Wimbledon, the world's most prestigious grass-court tennis tournament, starts on Monday, June 29, 2026, at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Tennis Grand Slam
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off on Monday. Who's your pick to lift the trophy this year?

angles.name: London's Tennis Spectacle
angles.copy: The eyes of the tennis world turn to London this Monday as Wimbledon begins! Get ready for two weeks of thrilling grass-court action. #Wimbledon2026

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Kicks Off
moments.blurb: American Express Presents BST Hyde Park begins tomorrow, June 27, featuring Garth Brooks headlining, with other major acts like ATEEZ, Maroon 5, Mumford & Sons, Duran Duran, Pitbull, and Lewis Capaldi performing across multiple dates until July 12.

angles.name: Hyde Park Headliners
angles.copy: BST Hyde Park kicks off tomorrow! Garth Brooks headlines the first night, with a huge lineup including Duran Duran, Maroon 5, and Lewis Capaldi over the next few weeks. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Garth Brooks Live
angles.copy: Country legend Garth Brooks plays his first UK show in almost 30 years tomorrow at BST Hyde Park! A truly unmissable night.

angles.name: Duran Duran at BST
angles.copy: Get ready to dance! Duran Duran bring their iconic hits to BST Hyde Park on July 5th. Pure 80s pop perfection!

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Debut
moments.blurb: The inaugural Blenheim Palace Festival begins tomorrow, June 27, featuring Pete Tong Ibiza Classics, followed by Alanis Morissette, Teddy Swims, Katy Perry, and Michael Bublé on subsequent dates until July 4.

angles.name: Palace Party
angles.copy: The stunning Blenheim Palace hosts its first-ever festival starting tomorrow! Pete Tong, Alanis Morissette, Katy Perry, and Michael Bublé are all set to perform. What a lineup!

angles.name: Pete Tong Ibiza Classics
angles.copy: Ibiza comes to Blenheim Palace tomorrow! Pete Tong brings his legendary Ibiza Classics for an unforgettable night under the stars. Who's joining the party?

moments.title: Harry Styles' Wembley Residency Continues
moments.blurb: Harry Styles' record-breaking 'Together, Together' world tour continues its residency at Wembley Stadium in London, with shows running until July 4.

angles.name: Harries at Wembley
angles.copy: The 'Harry Styles takeover' continues at Wembley! If you're heading to one of his shows this week, get ready for an incredible night. What song are you hoping to hear?

angles.name: London Loves Harry
angles.copy: Another week, another chance to see Harry Styles at Wembley! The atmosphere is electric for his ongoing London residency. Are you one of the lucky ones with tickets?

moments.title: Metallica Live in Cardiff
moments.blurb: Metallica's M72 World Tour comes to Principality Stadium in Cardiff on Sunday, June 28, bringing their 'No Repeat Weekend' concept to the UK.

angles.name: Metal in Cardiff
angles.copy: Cardiff, are you ready to rock?! Metallica hit the Principality Stadium this Sunday for their M72 World Tour. Expect a legendary night of heavy metal!

angles.name: Cardiff Rocks Out
angles.copy: Massive gig alert for Wales! Metallica are bringing their massive tour to Cardiff's Principality Stadium this Sunday. Get ready, it's going to be loud!

moments.title: Take That's Final UK Tour Date
moments.blurb: Take That conclude their UK tour tomorrow, June 27, marking one of their last opportunities to see the iconic group live for this run.

angles.name: End of an Era (for now)
angles.copy: It's the final UK show for Take That tomorrow! If you're lucky enough to be there, soak up every moment with the legends. What's your favourite Take That track?

angles.name: Pop Icons Live
angles.copy: Don't miss it! Take That play their last UK tour date tomorrow. A chance to see pop royalty in action!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the Number 1 spot on the Official UK Singles Chart for a 14th non-consecutive week, with new entries and climbers from Ella Langley, Harry Styles, and Shakira & Burna Boy.

angles.name: #1 Song Reign
angles.copy: Still at the top! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' makes it 14 weeks at Number 1 on the Official UK Singles Chart. What a run! What's your top track this week?

angles.name: Chart Climbers
angles.copy: New music making moves on the chart! Ella Langley hits the Top 10, Harry Styles climbs with 'American Girls', and the World Cup song from Shakira & Burna Boy is in the Top 20. Listen now!

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th season of Love Island UK continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing daily drama and romance from the villa to screens across the country.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's your favourite couple, and who do you think is heading for a shock dumping? Tune in tonight!

angles.name: Love Island Buzz
angles.copy: Everyone's talking about Love Island! Catch all the latest from the villa tonight on ITV2 and ITVX. What's been the biggest moment so far this series?

moments.title: Bruce Johnston's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, singer, songwriter, and long-standing member of The Beach Boys, celebrates his 84th birthday tomorrow, June 27. He joined the band in 1965.

angles.name: Beach Boys Legend
angles.copy: Sending good vibrations to Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys, who turns 84 tomorrow! What's your favourite Beach Boys song he was part of?

moments.title: Shirley Manson's 60th Birthday
moments.blurb: Shirley Manson, the iconic Scottish singer and frontwoman of the alternative rock band Garbage, celebrates her 60th birthday tomorrow, June 27. She joined Garbage in 1994.

angles.name: Garbage Frontwoman Turns 60
angles.copy: Happy 60th birthday to the incredible Shirley Manson of Garbage tomorrow! Still rocking as hard as ever. What's your go-to Garbage track?

moments.title: Drake Bell's 40th Birthday
moments.blurb: American actor and musician Drake Bell, known for 'Drake & Josh' and his pop-rock music, turns 40 tomorrow, June 27.

angles.name: Happy 40th Drake Bell
angles.copy: Happy 40th birthday tomorrow to Drake Bell! From Nickelodeon to pop-rock hits, what's your favourite of his tunes?

moments.title: Colin Hay's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, the Scottish-Australian singer-songwriter best known as the frontman of Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Men at Work Legend
angles.copy: Can you hear that? It's the sound of us wishing Colin Hay of Men at Work a very happy 73rd birthday on Saturday! What's your favourite track from the Aussie legends?

moments.title: Debbie Harry's 81st Birthday
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead singer of new wave band Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Call Me! Debbie Harry, the legendary voice of Blondie, turns 81 on Wednesday. What's your all-time favourite Blondie hit?

moments.title: Missy Elliott's 55th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Supa Dupa Fly Birthday
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! It's Missy Elliott's 55th birthday on Wednesday. A true pioneer in music! What's your favourite Missy track to dance to?

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays officially begin for many schools across the UK from July 1st, marking the start of the main summer break.

angles.name: School's Out For Summer
angles.copy: Ding dong, school's out! The summer holidays officially begin for many UK schools from July 1st. Time for adventures! What are your plans?

angles.name: Summer Break Vibes
angles.copy: That's a wrap for another school year! Happy Summer Holidays to all the students and teachers. Enjoy the break!

moments.title: Formula 1 British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix takes place at the iconic Silverstone Circuit from July 3rd to 5th, promising a weekend of high-speed racing action.

angles.name: F1 at Silverstone
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar! The British Grand Prix is at Silverstone next weekend, July 3-5. Who's your money on for pole position and the win?

angles.name: Home Race Excitement
angles.copy: The F1 circus comes home to Silverstone next week! Expect incredible racing and an electric atmosphere at the British Grand Prix. #F1

moments.title: Tour de France Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France, cycling's most prestigious race, begins in Barcelona, Spain, on July 4th, concluding on July 26th in Paris.

angles.name: Grand Départ
angles.copy: The greatest show on two wheels begins! The Tour de France starts in Barcelona on July 4th. Who are your favourites for the Yellow Jersey this year?

angles.name: Cycling Spectacle
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of epic cycling! The Tour de France kicks off next weekend, promising incredible stages and dramatic finishes. #TDF2026

moments.title: Post Malone's 31st Birthday
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Posty
angles.copy: Cheers to Post Malone, who turns 31 on July 4th! What's your top track from the 'rockstar' himself?

moments.title: 50 Cent's 51st Birthday
moments.blurb: Curtis '50 Cent' Jackson, the influential American rapper, actor, and businessman, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6.

angles.name: In Da Club Birthday
angles.copy: Go, shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on July 6th. What's your favourite hit from the G-Unit boss?
